Class EnchantManager

java.lang.Object
dev.agam.skyblockitems.enchantsystem.managers.EnchantManager
public class EnchantManager extends Object
Manages enchantment definitions loaded from enchants.yml.

    • getConflict

      public String getConflict(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, EnchantManager.EnchantConfig enchant)
      Checks if an enchantment conflicts with any existing enchantments on an item.
      Returns:
      The display name of the conflicting enchantment, or null if no conflict.
